name: Write Document
sequence: Describe in detail what you want, and the agent will follow documentation best practices. Multi-turn conversation with subprocess for research/review.
description: false

name: Update Standards
sequence: Update agent memory documentation-standards.md with your specific preferences if you discover missing document conventions.
description: false

name: Mermaid Generate
sequence: Create a Mermaid diagram based on user description. Will suggest diagram types if not specified.
description: false

name: Validate Document
sequence: Review the specified document against documentation standards and best practices. Returns specific actionable improvement suggestions organized by priority.
description: false

name: Explain Concept
sequence: Create clear technical explanations with examples and diagrams for complex concepts.
description: false

name: Brainstorm Project
sequence: Expert guided facilitation through a single or multiple techniques.
description: planning_artifacts

name: Check Implementation Readiness
sequence: Ensure PRD UX Architecture and Epics Stories are aligned.
description: planning_artifacts

name: Code Review
sequence: Story cycle: If issues back to DS if approved then next CS or ER if epic complete.

name: Correct Course
sequence: Navigate significant changes. May recommend start over update PRD redo architecture sprint planning or correct epics and stories.
description: planning_artifacts

name: Create Architecture
sequence: Guided workflow to document technical decisions.
description: planning_artifacts

name: Create Epics and Stories
description: planning_artifacts

name: Create PRD
sequence: Expert led facilitation to produce your Product Requirements Document.
description: planning_artifacts

name: Create Story
sequence: Story cycle start: Prepare first found story in the sprint plan that is next or a specific epic/story designation.
description: true

name: Validate Story
sequence: Validates story readiness and completeness before development work begins.
description: false

name: Create UX
sequence: Guidance through realizing the plan for your UX, strongly recommended if a UI is a primary piece of the proposed project.
description: planning_artifacts

name: Dev Epic
sequence: Develop all stories in an epic autonomously. Runs create-story then dev-story then code-review for every story without user intervention.
description: implementation_artifacts

name: Dev Story
sequence: Story cycle: Execute story implementation tasks and tests then CR then back to DS if fixes needed.

name: Document Project
sequence: Analyze an existing project to produce useful documentation.
description: project-knowledge

name: Domain Research
sequence: Industry domain deep dive subject matter expertise and terminology.
description: planning_artifacts|project_knowledge

name: Edit PRD
description: false

name: Generate Project Context
sequence: Scan existing codebase to generate a lean LLM-optimized project-context.md. Essential for brownfield projects.
description: output_folder

name: Market Research
sequence: Market analysis competitive landscape customer needs and trends.
description: planning_artifacts|project-knowledge

name: Create Brief
sequence: A guided experience to nail down your product idea.
description: planning_artifacts

name: QA Automation Test
sequence: Generate automated API and E2E tests for implemented code. NOT for code review or story validation — use CR for that.
description: implementation_artifacts

name: Quick Dev
sequence: Unified intent-in code-out workflow: clarify plan implement review and present.
description: implementation_artifacts

name: Retrospective
sequence: Optional at epic end: Review completed work lessons learned and next epic or if major issues consider CC.
description: implementation_artifacts

name: Sprint Planning
sequence: Kicks off implementation by producing a plan the implementation agents will follow in sequence for every story.
description: implementation_artifacts

name: Sprint Status
sequence: Anytime: Summarize sprint status and route to next workflow.

name: Technical Research
sequence: Technical feasibility architecture options and implementation approaches.
description: planning_artifacts|project_knowledge

name: Validate PRD
description: false

name: Brainstorming
sequence: Use early in ideation or when stuck generating ideas.
description: {output_folder}/brainstorming

name: Distillator
sequence: Use when you need token-efficient distillates that preserve all information for downstream LLM consumption.
description: adjacent to source document or specified output_path

name: Editorial Review - Prose
sequence: Use after drafting to polish written content.
description: report located with target document
output-location: three-column markdown table with suggested fixes

name: Editorial Review - Structure
sequence: Use when doc produced from multiple subprocesses or needs structural improvement.
description: report located with target document

name: Index Docs
sequence: Use when LLM needs to understand available docs without loading everything.

name: Party Mode
sequence: Orchestrate multi-agent discussions when you need multiple perspectives or want agents to collaborate.

name: Adversarial Review
sequence: Use for quality assurance or before finalizing deliverables. Code Review in other modules runs this automatically, but also useful for document reviews.

name: Edge Case Hunter Review
sequence: Use alongside adversarial review for orthogonal coverage — method-driven not attitude-driven.

name: Shard Document
sequence: Use when doc becomes too large (>500 lines) to manage effectively.

name: ML Ideation & PRD
description: Frame ML research problem, define requirements, and produce Research Thesis and PRD.

name: ML EDA & Research
description: Perform exploratory data analysis, establish baselines, and produce EDA report.

name: ML Architecture Design
description: Design model architecture, stack, and experiment tracking strategy.

name: Check Deployment Status
description: Check deployment status across Kubernetes namespaces and report issues.

name: Check Secrets
description: Debug and verify secret configurations in Kubernetes clusters.

name: Check System Status
description: Perform overall system status check across cluster resources.

name: Day 2 Ops
description: Execute Day 2 operations and maintenance tasks for running systems.

name: Deployment Strategies
description: Evaluate and recommend deployment strategies (blue-green, canary, rolling).

name: Fix Deployments
description: Troubleshoot and fix failed or degraded deployments.

name: GitOps Status
description: Check GitOps sync status and detect configuration drift.

name: Configure Infrastructure
description: Configure infrastructure components using Infrastructure as Code patterns.

name: Disconnected Deployment
description: Deploy to air-gapped or disconnected environments.

name: Docker Compose Setup
description: Set up and manage Docker Compose configurations.

name: Manage Helm
description: Deploy and manage Helm charts for Kubernetes.

name: Sign Docker Image
description: Sign Docker images using Cosign/Notary for supply chain security.

name: Generate Certs
description: Generate secure self-signed certificates and Root CAs using OpenSSL.

name: Immunity Estimation
description: Estimate cyber immunity posture and resilience metrics.

name: Security Audit
description: Perform comprehensive security audit against industry standards.

name: Vault Secrets
description: Manage HashiCorp Vault secret configurations and policies.

name: Verify Docker Users
description: Verify Docker image user configurations and hardening compliance.

name: Verify Image Signature
description: Verify Docker image signatures for supply chain integrity.

name: Vulnerability Scan
description: Orchestrate vulnerability scanning across project components.

name: Create Bug Story
description: Create a structured bug story with severity and type classification, add to backlog.yaml.

name: Add Sprint
description: Create a new sprint entity with capacity limits and optional ISO dates (YAML schema).

name: Modify Sprint
description: Modify existing sprint — add/remove items, change capacity, update metadata.

name: Add to Sprint
description: Assign backlog items to a sprint from flat prioritized backlog.

name: Project Context Expansion
description: Post-retrospective companion to update project-context.md with new rules.

name: Sprint Status View
description: View sprint status with capacity, items, and backlog. Regenerates sprint-status.yaml.

name: Generate Backlog
description: Generate or refresh flat backlog from epics and bug stories.

name: Remove from Sprint
description: Remove items from a sprint and return to unassigned backlog.

name: Cleanup Done
description: Archive done items — move files to done/ and remove from sprint/backlog.

name: Prioritize Backlog
description: Reprioritize backlog using multiple criteria — severity, value, dependencies.

name: ML Detailed Design
description: Break down infrastructure and experiment tasks from architecture.

name: ML TechSpec (Contract)
description: Lock experiment parameters and performance tiers before training.

name: ML Infra & Sync
description: Build ML infrastructure, manage dependencies, and run smoke tests.

name: ML Experiment
description: Execute training experiments against locked TechSpec and log metrics.

name: ML Results Analysis
description: Evaluate experiment outcomes against TechSpec success tiers.

name: ML HPO (Tuning)
description: Perform automated hyperparameter optimization (conditional).

name: ML Iterative Revision
description: Amend hypothesis and requirements based on experiment findings.

name: SRE Agent
description: Site Reliability Engineer agent for system availability, reliability, and Kubernetes operations.

name: DevOps Agent
description: DevOps Engineer agent for CI/CD pipeline automation, Infrastructure as Code, and cloud-native technologies.

name: Cyber Agent
description: Cyber Security Analyst agent for vulnerability assessment, threat modeling, and system hardening.

name: MIL-498 Agent
description: MIL-STD-498 Documentation Expert agent for defense industry standards and Data Item Descriptions.

name: ML Agent (Demerzel)
description: Machine Learning Scientist specializing in falsifiable hypothesis validation and failure-cost analysis.

name: ML Advise & Search
description: Search past experiments and surface findings or failure warnings.

name: ML Retrospective
description: Capture session learnings and update project context.

name: Generate SRS
description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 Software Requirements Specification from BMAD project artifacts

name: Generate SDD
description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 Software Design Description from architecture and design docs

name: Generate SDP
description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 Software Development Plan from project planning artifacts

name: Generate OCD
description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 Operational Concept Description from PRD and architecture

name: Generate SSS
description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 System/Subsystem Specification from project requirements

name: Generate STD
description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 Software Test Description from epics stories and architecture

name: Generate SSDD
description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 System/Subsystem Design Description from architecture and PRD
